creator: Jeff.Palmer@h3u1-a2c897.elp.rr.com
text:
Updated to the latest version of slrn
Package defaults to --enable-inews,  changed to --disable-inews
Removed the bz2 requirement.  the MASTER_SITES packages .tar.gz also.
Updated distinfo
Updated pkg-plist
Removed patch-ab

patch-ab needs to be removed.   

I create my patches with cvs -q diff -u
If there is a better way (that deals with added/deleted files better)
please let me know?
